task_completion.description: Enable the Freestyle rendering engine in Blender.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Render Properties tab (camera icon) on the right panel, the 'Freestyle' checkbox is ticked.

task_completion.description: Set the world background color to white.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the World Properties tab (globe icon), the Background Color is set to pure white (RGB 1, 1, 1 or Hex FFFFFF).
In the Output Properties tab (printer icon), the Format Resolution X is set to 1920 px and Resolution Y is set to 1080 px.

task_completion.description: Configure Freestyle line color to black and thickness between 2.0 and 5.0 pixels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the View Layer Properties tab (stacked pictures icon), under the 'Freestyle Line Style' section, the Base Color is set to black (RGB 0, 0, 0) and the Thickness value is between 2.0 and 5.0.
Blender's 'Save Image As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'line_art_render.png' in the '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/' directory, or a file manager confirms the file exists.
The Blender window title displays 'freestyle_setup.blend' indicating it was saved, or a 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved to the correct path.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender GUI to configure the settings and render the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with Blender's graphical interface (panels, properties, render window) rather than just executing a script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The rendered image is a genuine line art render of the BMW model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender render window or the saved image shows a technical line drawing (black lines on a white background) of a BMW car, not a downloaded image or an empty file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly create dummy files bypassing Blender.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file creation and saving process is visible through Blender's UI (Save As dialogs, Render Image window) or legitimate file manager windows.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected project file: /home/ga/BlenderProjects/freestyle_setup.blend. Expected render output: /home/ga/BlenderProjects/line_art_render.png. Line thickness must be between 2.0 and 5.0 pixels. Resolution must be exactly 1920x1080.
